Container.Name: vllm-turboquant
Container.Overview: vLLM OpenAI-compatible server with TurboQuant KV cache compression. Optimized for consumer GPUs (RTX 3060 12GB). Supports Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ and Google Gemma 4 E4B. TurboQuant compresses KV cache 2.7x, dramatically increasing context window on limited VRAM.
Container.Requires: Nvidia Driver plugin must be installed.
Container.Description: vLLM with TurboQuant KV cache compression for maximum context on consumer GPUs.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Cache
Config.Description: Persistent model cache directory. Models download here on first launch (~5.5GB for Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ).

Config.Name: Model
Config.Description: HuggingFace model ID. Options: QuantTrio/Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ (Quantization=awq), google/gemma-4-E4B-it (Quantization=auto), lcu0312/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-AWQ-4bit (Quantization=awq, use image tag :gemma4). For more context, use cyankiwi/Qwen3.5-4B-AWQ-4bit instead.

Config.Name: Max Context Length
Config.Description: Maximum context window in tokens. Start at 24576 for 9B, push to 32768 if stable. Use 49152+ with 4B model. Reduce if OOM.

Config.Name: TurboQuant Enabled
Config.Description: Enable TurboQuant KV cache compression (2.7x). Set 'true' or 'false'.

Config.Name: Tensor Parallel Size
Config.Description: Number of GPUs to split model across. Set 2 for dual GPU, 1 for single GPU.

Config.Name: Enable Thinking
Config.Description: Enable Qwen3.5 thinking/reasoning mode. Set 'true' or 'false'.

Config.Name: GPU Memory Utilization
Config.Description: Fraction of GPU VRAM to use (0.0-1.0). Higher = more context but risk of OOM.

Config.Name: Max Concurrent Sequences
Config.Description: Maximum concurrent requests. Lower = more memory per request for longer context.

Config.Name: Quantization
Config.Description: Model weight quantization method. 'awq' for AWQ models, 'gptq' for GPTQ, 'auto' for base/unquantized models like Gemma 4 E4B.

Config.Name: Data Type
Config.Description: Compute precision. 'half' (FP16) or 'bfloat16'. Both work on RTX 3060.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Token
Config.Description: HuggingFace token for gated models. Not needed for Qwen3.5-9B-AWQ.
